verdict_reason: Two Major findings on logging patterns that violate structured logging best practices for observability and debuggability.

todos.issue: Log message uses string concatenation instead of structured object; violates static message pattern
todos.fix: Change to: logger.info({ referenceNumber }, 'Notification moved to amend')

todos.issue: Error log passes only err.message instead of full error object; loses stack trace and type information
todos.fix: Change to: logger.error({ err, referenceNumber }, 'Failed to amend notification')
